creator: gerrit.kuehn@aei.mpg.de
text:
I've seen some very similar (I think, see below) crashes lately on a transparent filtering (with pf) bridge system that ran fine for months before that. I cannot say anything about the traffic or load it had, but I doubt it was much. The crash did not appear again (yet) after upgrading to 10.3-p7:

---
Mon Sep 19 02:55:28 CEST 2016

FreeBSD ahfwx.aei.uni-hannover.de 10.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE #0 r297264: Fri Mar 25 02:10:02 UTC 2016     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

panic: page fault
